content: Bug 1: Bump closet list default limit so 313-item closets load in one request
Bug 3: Trigger auto-list on marketplace_intent transition (not just source) + use correct mode + retire on 'own'
Verify Bug 2 resolves via Bug 3 fix (new items auto-list → delete retires correctly)
Backfill: auto-list existing items where marketplace_intent is sell/swap/donate but no listing exists
Smoke test via curl: patch item with marketplace_intent=for_sale → listing created → delete → listing retired
Update CHANGELOG.md + commit as v1.1.1 hotfix
